mapper.select: select dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, status, dingtalk_dept_id from sys_dept where dingtalk_dept_id = #{dingtalkDeptId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, status, dingtalk_dept_id from sys_dept where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select dept_id from sys_dept where dingtalk_dept_id = #{dingtalkDeptId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept ( parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, order_num, status, del_flag, dingtalk_dept_id, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{parentId}, #{ancestors}, #{deptName}, #{orderNum}, '0', '0', #{dingtalkDeptId}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update: update sys_dept set parent_id = #{parentId}, ancestors = #{ancestors}, dept_name = #{deptName}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, status, del_flag, dingtalk_user_id from sys_user where dingtalk_user_id = #{dingtalkUserId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user ( dept_id, user_name, nick_name, user_type, email, phonenumber, sex, avatar, password, status, del_flag, dingtalk_user_id, dingtalk_unionid, dingtalk_dept_id, dingtalk_job_number, dingtalk_post_name, dingtalk_missing_count, dimission_time, last_sync_time, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, '00', #{email}, #{phonenumber}, '2', '', #{password}, '0', '0', #{dingtalkUserId}, #{dingtalkUnionid}, #{dingtalkDeptId}, #{jobNumber}, #{postName}, 0, null, #{now}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update: update sys_user set dept_id = #{deptId}, nick_name = #{nickName}, email = #{email}, phonenumber = #{phonenumber}, status = '0', del_flag = '0', dingtalk_unionid = #{dingtalkUnionid}, dingtalk_dept_id = #{dingtalkDeptId}, dingtalk_job_number = #{jobNumber}, dingtalk_post_name = #{postName}, dingtalk_missing_count = 0, dimission_time = null, last_sync_time = #{now}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}

update sys_user set status = '1', dimission_time = ifnull(dimission_time, #{now}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where dingtalk_user_id is not null and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and ifnull(dingtalk_missing_count, 0) >= #{threshold}
update sys_user set status = '1', dimission_time = #{dimissionTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where dingtalk_user_id = #{dingtalkUserId} and del_flag = '0'
